## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's product, traction, and future plans with Bessemer Venture Partners.](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has built an AI-powered content creation and knowledge work platform, delivering high-quality outputs at scale](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [The company has reached $6.6M ARR since incorporation in January 2023, with strong growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [GrowthX is focused on building infrastructure and talent, planning for a Series B later this year to optimize valuation](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)

## Topics

### Product Overview

  - [AI workflow engine represented in code, not low-code tools](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Workflows architected by experts, then automated and scaled](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Delivers outcomes (e.g. content, research) vs. just software tools](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Infrastructure includes task hub, AI workflow engine, and learning engine](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Can be applied beyond content to areas like hiring processes](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)

### Customer Traction

  - [ICP: Mid to late-stage tech companies scaling quickly](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Notable clients: Ramp, Reddit, Yellow AI, Stack Blitz, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Diverse verticals: e-commerce, travel, healthcare, fintech, dev tools](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Minimum engagement $108K/year, most proposals $144K-$480K/year](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [60+ deals in pipeline, booked through April](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

### Team & Hiring

  - [Recently closed $12M Series A led by Madrona Venture Group](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Hiring rapidly - 20 people in last two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Attracting top talent with cash-heavy offers and international hiring](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2490.0)
  - [Recent key hires from TripAdvisor, TechCrunch, potentially HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)

### Financial Performance

  - [Current gross margins at 74%, projecting temporary dip to 54% in H1 2023](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
  - [Expect margins to recover to 71% by end of 2023, 80% by end of 2024](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
  - [Conservative financial model assumes no marketing investment](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [Projecting $22-23M ARR by end of 2023 at current growth rate](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2109.0)

### Future Plans

  - [Building out infrastructure, framework, and learning engine](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Planning Series B later in 2023 to optimize valuation](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
  - [Considering small acquisitions to build distribution in key verticals](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)
  - [Focused on proving out model and rewarding early employees](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to potentially meet with Bessemer team in San Francisco next week](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [Continue building relationship for potential future investment opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on hiring, onboarding, and executing on current plans](https://fathom.video/share/y-s2e9qgWAJzsBV36KEN6sbhuoGnsXy6?tab=summary&timestamp=2513.0)
